steps.title: Pick two points spanning the requested interval
steps.content: From the scatterplot, the points at $x=5$ and $x=7$ are $(5,14)$ and $(7,24)$. These bookend the interval over which the average rate of change is requested.

steps.title: Compute the average rate of change
steps.content:
Apply the slope formula to $(5,14)$ and $(7,24)$:
$$\frac{24-14}{7-5} = \frac{10}{2} = 5$$
The average rate of change from $x=5$ to $x=7$ is $5^\circ\text{C}$ per minute. The answer is 5.
